title: BackpackCommitPayload
description: A ratified, append-only, versioned backpack mutation: add a lesson/playbook or retire one. Never deletes history.

action.description: 'add' appends a lesson/playbook; 'retire' appends a tombstone disabling a prior one. History is never deleted.

kind.description: Required when action=add. A heuristic (lesson) or a reusable task strategy (playbook) — never a capability or constraint change.

version.description: Append-only version counter for this target_role's backpack.

supersedes_lesson_id.description: For action=retire: the lesson being disabled.
